ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that collected the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day the data was collected */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the hour the data was collected */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall data (mm) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature data (°C) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity data (%) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the initial quality of the data (e.g., good, questionable, bad) */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., rainfall, temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default unit for the data type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum possible value for the data type */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum possible value for the data type */,
  "precision" INTEGER /* Precision of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the unit belongs to */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., mm, °C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format (e.g., CSV, NetCDF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file (MB) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format used */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "file_source" TEXT /* Source of the file (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data the quality metrics belong to */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data (0-1) */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness of the data (0-1) */,
  "consistency" REAL /* Consistency of the data (0-1) */,
  "timeliness" REAL /* Timeliness of the data (0-1) */,
  "reliability" REAL /* Reliability of the data (0-1) */,
  "source_validity" REAL /* Validity of the data source (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data the validation results belong to */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the data was validated */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the data validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the validation */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_cleansing" (
  "cleansing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data cleansing record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data the cleansing results belong to */,
  "cleansing_date" TEXT /* Date the data was cleansed */,
  "cleansing_result" TEXT /* Result of the data cleansing (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "cleansing_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the cleansing */,
  "cleansed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the cleansing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleansing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_cleansing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_cleansing_cleansed_by FOREIGN KEY ("cleansed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
